priority_mapping._comment: Canonical values: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW. Legacy mappings normalize variants.

prefix_mappings._comment: Map requirement ID prefixes to categories. Only needed if auto_detect fails.

status_markers._comment: STANDARDIZED markers. All new results.md files MUST use these exact formats.

work_to_requirement._comment: Only needed if requirements lack frontmatter IDs. Maps work dir names to requirement IDs.
